creator: doctorwhoguy@gmail.com
text: I have a PDP brand Xbox One controller. FreeBSD assigns it a ugen device number, but it doesn't recognize it as a uhid device or otherwise make it usable. Apparently the PDP brand requires an additional 2 packets to complete its initialization process compared to a regular Xbox One controller. So perhaps it may be trivial to add a quirk for this brand if regular Xbox One controllers already work on FreeBSD.
